sentences.target: Mon grand-père était caporal pendant son service militaire.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ etɛ kapɔʁal pɑ̃dɑ̃ sɔ̃ sɛʁvis militɛʁ/

translations.fr: Mon grand-père était caporal pendant son service militaire.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ etɛ kapɔʁal pɑ̃dɑ̃ sɔ̃ sɛʁvis militɛʁ/
translations.en: My grandfather was a corporal during his military service.
translations.es: Mi abuelo fue cabo durante su servicio militar.
translations.de: Mein Großvater war während seines Militärdienstes Korporal.
translations.it: Mio nonno era caporale durante il servizio militare.
translations.ko: 제 할아버지는 군 복무 동안 상병이었습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的祖父在服兵役期间是下士。
translations.yue: 我阿公喺服兵役期間係下士。
translations.ru: Мой дед был капралом во время своей военной службы.
translations.pt: Meu avô foi cabo durante o serviço militar.
translations.he: סבי היה רב״ט במהלך שירותו הצבאי.
translations.vi: Ông tôi là hạ sĩ trong thời gian nghĩa vụ quân sự.
translations.ar: كان جدي عريفًا خلال خدمته العسكرية.
translations.nl: Mijn grootvader was korporaal tijdens zijn militaire dienst.
translations.uk: Мій дід був капралом під час військової служби.
translations.hu: A nagyapám tizedes volt a katonai szolgálata alatt.
translations.hi: मेरे दादा अपनी सैन्य सेवा के दौरान कॉर्पोरल थे.
translations.pl: Mój dziadek był kapralem podczas służby wojskowej.
translations.el: Ο παππούς μου ήταν δεκανέας κατά τη διάρκεια της στρατιωτικής του θητείας.
translations.nb: Bestefaren min var korporal under sin militærtjeneste.
translations.id: Kakek saya adalah kopral selama dinas militernya.
translations.sv: Min farfar var korpral under sin militärtjänst.
translations.ro: Bunicul meu a fost caporal în timpul serviciului militar.
translations.cs: Můj dědeček byl během své vojenské služby desátníkem.
translations.da: Min bedstefar var korporal under sin militærtjeneste.
translations.ja: 私の祖父は兵役中に伍長でした。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular, modifying the noun 'grand-père'.
Compound common noun meaning 'grandfather'; head of the noun phrase 'Mon grand-père'.
Auxiliary verb (imperfect, 3rd person singular) used as a copula linking the subject to the predicate noun.
Common noun functioning as a predicate nominal (rank) after the copula 'était'.
Preposition introducing a temporal circumstantial complement.
3rd person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'service'.
Common noun; head of the prepositional object 'son service'.
Adjective modifying 'service' to specify the type of service.

sentences.target: Le caporal arrive dans cinq minutes.

translations.fr: Le caporal arrive dans cinq minutes.
translations.en: The corporal arrives in five minutes.
translations.es: El cabo llega en cinco minutos.
translations.de: Der Korporal kommt in fünf Minuten.
translations.it: Il caporale arriva tra cinque minuti.
translations.pt: O cabo chega em cinco minutos.
translations.vi: Hạ sĩ sẽ đến trong năm phút nữa.
translations.nl: De korporaal komt over vijf minuten.
translations.hu: A tizedes öt perc múlva megérkezik.
translations.el: Ο δεκανέας φτάνει σε πέντε λεπτά.
translations.id: Kopral itu tiba dalam lima menit.
translations.ja: 伍長は五分後に到着します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'caporal'.
Common noun serving as the subject head.
Main verb (present, 3rd person singular) indicating the action of arriving.
Preposition introducing a temporal measure phrase.
Cardinal number modifying 'minutes'.
Plural common noun; object of the preposition 'dans' expressing time.

sentences.target: Tu joues un caporal dans le film.
sentences.reading: /ty ʒu œ̃ kapɔʁal dɑ̃ lə film/

translations.fr: Tu joues un caporal dans le film.
translations.ipa: /ty ʒu œ̃ kapɔʁal dɑ̃ lə film/
translations.en: You play a corporal in the film.
translations.es: Interpretas a un cabo en la película.
translations.de: Du spielst in dem Film einen Korporal.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在这部电影里饰演一名下士。
translations.yue: 你喺呢套電影入面飾演一名下士。
translations.pt: Você interpreta um cabo no filme.
translations.vi: Bạn đóng vai một hạ sĩ trong bộ phim.
translations.ar: أنت تؤدي دور عريف في الفيلم.
translations.nl: Je speelt een korporaal in de film.
translations.hi: तुम फिल्म में एक कॉर्पोरल की भूमिका निभाते हो.
translations.nb: Du spiller en korporal i filmen.
translations.id: Kamu memerankan seorang kopral dalam film itu.
translations.sv: Du spelar en korpral i filmen.
translations.ro: Joci rolul unui caporal în film.
translations.da: Du spiller en korporal i filmen.
translations.ja: あなたはその映画で伍長を演じます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular).
Main verb (present, 2nd person singular); transitive here meaning to play/portray a role.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'caporal'.
Common noun functioning as the direct object (role being played).
Preposition introducing a locative/medium complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'film'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans', indicating the medium.

sentences.target: Ils cherchent un caporal pour encadrer l'équipe.
sentences.reading: /il ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ kapɔʁal puʁ ɑ̃kadʁe lekip/

translations.fr: Ils cherchent un caporal pour encadrer l'équipe.
translations.ipa: /il ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ kapɔʁal puʁ ɑ̃kadʁe lekip/
translations.en: They’re looking for a corporal to supervise the team.
translations.es: Buscan a un cabo para supervisar al equipo.
translations.de: Sie suchen einen Korporal, um das Team zu beaufsichtigen.
translations.it: Stanno cercando un caporale per supervisionare la squadra.
translations.ko: 그들은 팀을 감독할 상병을 찾고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在寻找一名下士来带队。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺搵一名下士嚟帶隊。
translations.ru: Они ищут капрала, чтобы руководить командой.
translations.pt: Eles estão procurando um cabo para supervisionar a equipe.
translations.he: הם מחפשים רב״ט לפיקוד על הצוות.
translations.tr: Takımı denetlemek için bir onbaşı arıyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ đang tìm một hạ sĩ để giám sát đội.
translations.ar: إنهم يبحثون عن عريف للإشراف على الفريق.
translations.nl: Ze zoeken een korporaal om het team aan te sturen.
translations.uk: Вони шукають капрала, щоб керувати командою.
translations.hu: Egy tizedest keresnek a csapat felügyeletére.
translations.hi: वे टीम की निगरानी के लिए एक कॉर्पोरल की तलाश कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουν έναν δεκανέα για να επιβλέπει την ομάδα.
translations.nb: De søker en korporal til å lede laget.
translations.id: Mereka mencari seorang kopral untuk mengawasi tim.
translations.sv: De söker en korpral för att leda gruppen.
translations.ro: Ei caută un caporal pentru a coordona echipa.
translations.da: De søger en korporal til at lede holdet.
translations.ja: 彼らはチームを指導するために伍長を探している。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person plural).
Main verb (present, 3rd person plural), transitive; takes a direct object ('un caporal').
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'caporal'.
Common noun; direct object of 'cherchent'.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement of 'pour' indicating purpose.
Noun 'équipe' with elided definite article 'le' as attached clitic 'l''; direct object of 'encadrer'.
